reviews.comment:
Llevan muchos meses en obra de reformas .espero no pierdan el parque que tenían ,pues los viajeros que acceden por ruta 22 lo apreciaban mucho. La atención buena y el personal atento.

(Translated by Google)
They've been doing renovations for many months. I hope they don't lose the park they had, as travelers arriving via Route 22 really appreciated it. The service was good and the staff attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVN29LX2JREAE
